title: best herbal teas for high blood pressure
description: Rosmarinus officinalis tea contains bioactive constituents such as carnosic acid, rosmarinic acid, and flavonoids that help to treat high blood pressure by reducing inflammation and improving blood vessel function. The antihypertensive properties of this tea are attributed to its ability to relax blood vessels, improve cardiovascular health, and reduce oxidative stress.
